expectations.text: Avoids giving a complete patched solution
expectations.evidence: The response suggests debugging directions and does not provide a full allocator patch.

expectations.text: Frames the problem in terms of allocator invariants or heap metadata consistency
expectations.evidence: It discusses alloc bits, header/footer consistency, free-list duplication, and heap corruption.

expectations.text: Requests the smallest next debugging artifacts instead of asking for the whole project
expectations.evidence: It asks for a broad set of functions including malloc, free, coalesce, place, and free-list operations rather than the narrowest next artifact.
